title: Ultimate Salad Dressing
excerpt: Ingredients 4 spring onions 3 garlic cloves 125 ml parsley 125 ml vinegar 30 ml sugar 20 ml mixed herbs 5 eggs 5 ml salt 750 ml oil Method Place the spring onions, garlic and parsley in a food processor and process until fine. Add the rest of the ingredients, except the oil, …
html:
Ingredients

  • 4 spring onions
  • 3 garlic cloves
  • 125 ml parsley
  • 125 ml vinegar
  • 30 ml sugar
  • 20 ml mixed herbs
  • 5 eggs
  • 5 ml salt
  • 750 ml oil

Method

Place the spring onions, garlic and parsley in a food processor and process until fine. Add the rest of the ingredients, except the oil, and mix.

Add the oil slowly and process in the food processor for 5 minutes or until thick.

Place in bottles in the fridge.

Makes about 1 litre of salad dressing.

Easy!
